title: TODO: short title
description: nginx is running but serving a broken config. A new virtual host was added to /etc/nginx/conf.d/winlab-reload.conf with a syntax error — a missing semicolon after the return directive. nginx started with the old config but the new config has not been loaded. A reload will fail until the syntax is fixed.
hint_4: sed -i 's/return 200 "reload pending"/return 200 "reload pending";/' /etc/nginx/conf.d/winlab-reload.conf && nginx -t && nginx -s reload
